_doc: Golden heartbeat parity vectors. Byte-identical in agent-rally-point (crates/rally-cli/tests/fixtures/) and build-loop (scripts/rally_point/). Asserts a claude session and a codex session that emit a presence/heartbeat at the same age decay IDENTICALLY — heartbeat is tool-agnostic. Each case: a presence record's age_secs and the half-life; both tools MUST yield the same recency_weight and same staleness verdict at heartbeat_minutes.
